notes: start_agent.rs:334/386 — StartAgentResult::Error.error renders via FormattedTextFragment::plain_text in the agent block UI (orchestration.rs:587-591), so user-facing -> translate; preserved identifier run_id and brand Oz; 'harness' -> '执行环境' per glossary; 'agent' -> 'Agent' kept. orchestration_controls.rs:64 ORCHESTRATION_ENV_NONE_LABEL 'Empty environment' is an env-picker UI label -> translate. code_review_view.rs:6224 'Failed to save file: {err}' is the safe: arg of safe_error! which expands to log::error! (crates/warp_core/src/safe_log.rs) — logfile sink, not UI -> telemetry_payload. billing_cycle_usage_section.rs:759 'Open the admin panel' is an upgrade-nudge UI string -> 打开管理面板. billing_and_usage_page_v2.rs:803 'Base credits' is a render_balance_card title, 1272/1365 'Buy credits' is a Text::new_inline header — both UI; credit -> 积分 per glossary. auth_secret_ftux_view.rs:221 'Failed to save API key: {error}' flows into DismissibleToast::error (UI toast) -> translate, {error} placeholder + brand API preserved, full-width colon.
